heading: Oath; custody
label: 2906 Oath; custody
text: The oath of office taken by an individual under shall be delivered by him to, and preserved by, the House of Congress, agency, or court to which the office pertains.section 3331 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 21R.S. § 1759.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
